majority_classifier.description: Naive baseline: always predicts majority class (no consequence). Sets the floor — any useful model must beat F1=0.44.

logistic_baseline.description: L2-regularized logistic regression with balanced class weights on 7 tabular NLP features

random_forest_tfidf.description: Random Forest combining 7 tabular NLP features with TF-IDF bigrams (500 features) from document text

sentence_transformer_svc.description: Deep learning: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (fixed encoder, no fine-tuning) mean-pooled embeddings (384-dim) + 7 tabular features (391-dim total) -> LinearSVC with calibrated probabilities. Bottlenecked by tiny test set (3 positives).
sentence_transformer_svc.note: Same F1 as majority classifier due to only 3 positives in test set. CV F1=0.133. Model is correctly implemented; artifacts saved to models/stsvc.pkl.

legal_bert.description: DEPRECATED — Fine-tuned Legal-BERT (nlpaueb/legal-bert-base-uncased) on document-level text. Failed due to insufficient training samples for 110M param fine-tuning. Replaced by sentence_transformer_svc.

stress_test.description: Class imbalance analysis: 51 no-consequence vs 15 with-consequence (77% vs 23%). With 80/20 stratified split, test set has ~11 negative and ~3 positive samples. Single misclassification swings F1 significantly.
